metadata.name: Identify Source of Illegal Dumping in Waterway

description: A water quality sensor detects an illegal chemical discharge into a river. An operator must trace the source.

nodes.task_description: Receive a 'Chemical Anomaly' alert from a water quality sensor in the 'City River'.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent acknowledges the high-priority environmental alert.

nodes.task_description: Review camera feeds from upstream storm drains and industrial outfalls near the sensor.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent reviews footage from several cameras.

nodes.task_description: Identify a truck illegally dumping liquid into a storm drain from one of the camera feeds.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds visual evidence of the illegal dumping, including the truck's license plate.

nodes.task_description: Create a report and dispatch an environmental enforcement team to investigate the company associated with the truck.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent escalates the incident to the appropriate enforcement agency.
